hooks.command: echo 'Code was edited while a preview server is running. If the change is observable in the browser preview (per <when_to_verify>), follow <verification_workflow>. Otherwise skip.' >&2

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$f" == /Users/veroraj/Website/*.html ]] || exit 0; url="file://$f"; open -a "Google Chrome" "$url"; "/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" --user-data-dir="/tmp/chrome-mobile-preview" --window-size=390,844 --user-agent="Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 16_6 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/16.6 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1" "$url" 2>/dev/null &
